PARK OFFICIALS HAVE CLOSED SCENIC DRIVE DUE TO WATER FROM GRAND WASH. BOTH GRAND WASH AND CAPITOL GORGE ARE FULL AND FLASHING.

AS OF 430 PM MDT...PARK RANGERS CONTINUE TO REPORT FLASH FLOODING IN CAPITOL REEF NATIONAL PARK...WITH PARTS OF THE SCENIC DRIVE REMAINING IMPASSABLE. SIGNIFICANT DEBRIS FLOWED ONTO THE SCENIC DRIVE FROM HEAVY RAINFALL SHORTLY AFTER 1 PM MDT...ESPECIALLY NEAR THE SLICK ROCK DIVIDE...AND FLASH FLOODING OCCURRED IN GRAND WASH AND CAPITOL GORGE. SIGNIFICANT HEAVY FLOWS ARE ALSO OCCURRING ON SULPHUR AND PLEASANT CREEKS...AS WELL AS ALL ASSOCIATED WASHES...WITH WATER A FOOT DEEP IN SULPHUR CREEK.
